release_notes: The device label export only wrote brand, model, serial and condition — so colour, memory/storage, battery %, and category-specific fields (laptop CPU/RAM/SSD/screen/GPU, watch size/band, console edition, etc.) were missing. Labels now carry **all** of a device's relevant fields for its category, and each category shows only its own fields. The exported file gained dedicated columns (storage, colour, battery, specs) plus a ready-made **`details`** one-line summary, and the export dialog now shows a **Label text** preview column so you can see exactly what the sticker will contain before printing.; Note: to make the extra fields appear on the printed sticker, point your YunPrint label template at the new columns (the `details` column gives you everything in one line).
